_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to update the homepage hero text, intro section, and highlights.

hero.badge: Kolhapur's Premier Spa, Massage & Wellness Studio
hero.headline:
Heal. Restore.
Feel Extraordinary.
hero.subheadline: Expert therapeutic massages, rejuvenating spa rituals, and premium salon care — crafted for athletes, active lifestyles, and everyone who deserves to feel their absolute best.

intro.heading:
Where Recovery
Meets Radiance.
intro.body: At Orchid, we are more than a salon — we are Kolhapur's dedicated wellness and recovery studio. Built for the athlete pushing physical limits, the bodybuilder managing muscle recovery, the gym-goer carrying post-workout soreness, the senior citizen seeking gentle therapeutic relief, the frequent traveller unwinding after long journeys, and anyone living with chronic body pain or daily stress. Our certified therapists blend advanced massage techniques and healing spa rituals with premium salon and skincare services — delivering a complete experience that restores your body, calms your mind, and reveals your best self.

highlights.title: Therapeutic Recovery
highlights.description: From deep tissue and sports massage to hot stone therapy — our treatments target post-workout soreness, muscle tension, joint stiffness, and chronic body pain with clinical precision.

highlights.title: Built for Every Body
highlights.description: Athletes, bodybuilders, senior citizens, gym-goers, sports persons, and frequent travellers — our spa and wellness treatments are personalised to every lifestyle and physical need.

highlights.title: Spa, Wellness & Salon
highlights.description: A complete destination — restorative body wraps, signature facials, therapeutic massages, and precision salon services. Everything you need, all under one roof.

highlights.title: Hygienic & Trusted
highlights.description: We maintain strict hygiene standards — sterilised tools, fresh towels, and a clean, safe environment for every client, every single visit.

ctaBanner.heading: Ready for Recovery & Relaxation?
ctaBanner.subheading: Whether you're managing body pain, post-workout soreness, travel fatigue, or simply need a full reset — we're ready for you.
